name: Gas Cylinders
description: Industrial gas cylinders for construction and fabrication. LPG, oxygen, argon, and acetylene cylinders for welding, cutting, and heating applications.

machines.name: Emirates Gas 44kg LPG (Propane) Industrial Cylinder
machines.shortDescription: Emirates Gas 44 kg LPG propane industrial cylinder. Standard UAE construction site cylinder for slab heating, waterproofing torches, and site canteen cooking.
machines.description: Emirates Gas 44 kg LPG propane industrial cylinder. Standard UAE construction site cylinder for slab heating, waterproofing torches, and site canteen cooking. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Emirates Gas certified cylinder — legal for use on all Dubai Municipality and Trakhees sites
44 kg LPG delivers 840 kWh of energy — enough for a full week of slab heating on one cylinder
POL left-hand thread valve standard across all UAE gas equipment — no adapters needed
50 kg tare weight with integrated collar for crane lifting and cylinder cage stacking
7-10 bar delivery pressure at ambient Gulf temperature — no vaporizer needed for torches
Available for exchange rental — return empty, collect full, no cylinder ownership cost

machines.name: Air Products 50L Argon Gas Cylinder (for TIG welding)
machines.shortDescription: Air Products 50 L argon gas cylinder at 200 bar. High-purity shielding gas for TIG welding of stainless steel, aluminium, and titanium on fabrication and pipe welding projects.
machines.description: Air Products 50 L argon gas cylinder at 200 bar. High-purity shielding gas for TIG welding of stainless steel, aluminium, and titanium on fabrication and pipe welding projects. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Valve: DIN 6 right-hand thread with flow restrictor

features: 99.998% pure argon — certified for TIG welding stainless steel, aluminium, and reactive alloys
200 bar fill delivers 10.5 m³ of shielding gas at 10-15 L/min for 12 hours of continuous TIG welding
Flow restrictor valve with integrated pressure gauge — no separate regulator needed for basic setups
DIN 6 right-hand thread matches all major TIG torch and regulator brands
Seamless steel cylinder to ISO 9809-1 with 10-year hydrostatic test interval compliance
Air Products supply network across the UAE for guaranteed exchange availability at all branches

machines.name: BOC 50L Oxygen Gas Cylinder (for oxy-acetylene cutting)
machines.shortDescription: BOC 50 L oxygen gas cylinder at 200 bar. Industrial-grade oxygen for oxy-acetylene cutting, brazing, and heating on demolition, ship repair, and steel erection projects.
machines.description: BOC 50 L oxygen gas cylinder at 200 bar. Industrial-grade oxygen for oxy-acetylene cutting, brazing, and heating on demolition, ship repair, and steel erection projects. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Safety: Burst disc over-pressure relief, oil-free service

features: Oxygen 99.5% minimum purity — certified for oxy-acetylene cutting and brazing to AS 4289
200 bar fill provides 10.5 m³ oxygen for a full day of heavy steel cutting at 30 mm plate thickness
Brass valve body with DIN 9 thread prevents galling and seizing common with steel valve stems
Burst disc over-pressure relief at 300 bar — secondary safety beyond the cylinder valve
Oil-free certified — cleaned and bagged for oxygen service to prevent combustion hazard
BOC Linde Group global supply chain with cylinder traceability and 5-year hydrostatic testing

machines.name: Linde 40L Acetylene Gas Cylinder
machines.shortDescription: Linde 40 L acetylene gas cylinder with porous mass filler. Dissolved acetylene for oxy-acetylene cutting, welding, and heating in construction steelwork and demolition.
machines.description: Linde 40 L acetylene gas cylinder with porous mass filler. Dissolved acetylene for oxy-acetylene cutting, welding, and heating in construction steelwork and demolition. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Valve: Left-hand thread brass, with flashback arrestor
specifications.Internal: Porous mass monolith with acetone solvent
specifications.Standard: ISO 3807 safety standard for acetylene cylinders

features: Porous mass monolith filler dissolves acetylene in acetone — stable up to 18 bar without decomposition
Left-hand thread valve with integral flashback arrestor prevents reverse gas flow and internal ignition
7.5 m³ acetylene at 3-5 L/min cutting rate pairs perfectly with one 50 L oxygen cylinder per day
ISO 3807 compliant cylinder with fusible plug safety device that melts at 100°C in fire conditions
Linde cylinder tracking with QR code label for instant cylinder history and test date verification
52 kg empty weight with steel base ring for stable vertical storage in cylinder cages and banks
